title.tr: BSOD / Stop Code Sorun Giderme (Microsoft Learn)

risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Learn 'Stop code error or bug check troubleshooting' (12 Sub 2026 guncel) belgesinden alinmistir. Microsoft'un kok-neden istatistigi: %70 ucuncu parti surucu, %10 donanim, %5 Microsoft kodu, %15 cozulemeyen.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Learn 'Stop code error or bug check troubleshooting' (updated 2026-02-12). Microsoft's root-cause stats: 70% third-party drivers, 10% hardware, 5% Microsoft code, 15% unknown.

body.tr: 1) Event log'da stop error kodunu bul, online ara. 2) En son Windows cumulative + rollup guncellemelerini yukle. 3) BIOS/firmware'i guncelle. 4) Donanim ve memory testleri calistir. 5) Microsoft Safety Scanner veya virus tarama yap. 6) Disk'te %10-15 bos alan oldugundan emin ol. 7) Hata mesajinda gecen surucu/uygulama icin uretici ile iletisim kur.
body.en: 1) Find the stop code in event logs, search online. 2) Install latest cumulative + rollup updates. 3) Update BIOS/firmware. 4) Run hardware and memory tests. 5) Run Microsoft Safety Scanner or antivirus. 6) Ensure 10-15 percent free disk space. 7) Contact vendor of any driver/app named in the error.

body.tr: 1) Taskbar arama > 'Advanced system settings' > Enter. 2) Advanced sekmesi > Startup and Recovery > Settings. 3) 'Write debugging information' altinda 'Automatic memory dump' sec. 4) OK > Restart. Dump konumlari: Minidump (256 KB) %SystemRoot%\Minidump\, Kernel/Automatic %SystemRoot%\MEMORY.DMP.
body.en: 1) Taskbar search > 'Advanced system settings' > Enter. 2) Advanced tab > Startup and Recovery > Settings. 3) Under 'Write debugging information' pick 'Automatic memory dump'. 4) OK > Restart. Locations: Minidump (256 KB) %SystemRoot%\Minidump\, Kernel/Automatic %SystemRoot%\MEMORY.DMP.

body.tr: 1) memory.dmp dosyasini baska bilgisayara kopyala. 2) Windows 10 SDK indir. 3) Kurulumda 'Debugging Tools for Windows' sec - WinDbg yuklenir. 4) WinDbg > File > Symbol File Path > Microsoft sembol sunucusunu gir: https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols. 5) Open Crash Dump > memory.dmp ac. 6) 'Bugcheck Analysis' altinda '!analyze -v' calistir. 7) Detayli bug check analizi gorulur. 8) STACK_TEXT bolumune in - hangi DLL/servis crash'e sebep oldugunu gosterir.
body.en: 1) Copy memory.dmp to another PC. 2) Download Windows 10 SDK. 3) In installer pick 'Debugging Tools for Windows' - WinDbg installs. 4) WinDbg > File > Symbol File Path > enter Microsoft symbol server: https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols. 5) Open Crash Dump > open memory.dmp. 6) Under 'Bugcheck Analysis' run '!analyze -v'. 7) Detailed bug check analysis appears. 8) Scroll to STACK_TEXT - shows the DLL/service that caused the crash.

title.tr: Microsoft'un belirledigi yaygin stop kodlari + cozumler
title.en: Common stop codes + resolutions per Microsoft

body.tr: VIDEO_TDR_TIMEOUT_DETECTED (0x117) - GPU surucu uretici guncelleme. DRIVER_IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL (0xD1) - cumulative update + ag surucusu guncelle. PAGE_FAULT_IN_NONPAGED_AREA (0x50) - hata mesajindaki surucuyu uretici ile guncelle, chkdsk /f /r. NTFS_FILE_SYSTEM (0x24) - donanim diagnostics + scan disk (Properties > Tools > Check now). KMODE_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED (0x1E) - hata mesajindaki surucuyu devre disi birak. DPC_WATCHDOG_VIOLATION (0x133) - dump'tan surucu bul, devre disi birak.
body.en: VIDEO_TDR_TIMEOUT_DETECTED (0x117) - update GPU driver from vendor. DRIVER_IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL (0xD1) - apply cumulative update + update network driver. PAGE_FAULT_IN_NONPAGED_AREA (0x50) - update driver named in error, chkdsk /f /r. NTFS_FILE_SYSTEM (0x24) - hardware diagnostics + scan disk (Properties > Tools > Check now). KMODE_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED (0x1E) - disable the driver named in error. DPC_WATCHDOG_VIOLATION (0x133) - find driver in dump, disable.

steps.command: Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; ID=1001} -MaxEvents 10 | Select TimeCreated, Message | Format-Table -Wrap

body.tr: Microsoft uyarisi: Driver Verifier CPU'yu yogun kullanir, bilgisayari yavaslatir. Hatali surucu bulunca stop error olusturup proaktif tespit eder. Test tum suruculeri tek seferde acmayin - 10-20 'supheli' surucu gruplari halinde acin. Eger bilgisayar Verifier nedeniyle acilamazsa, Safe Mode'da kapatabilirsiniz.
body.en: Microsoft warning: Driver Verifier consumes lots of CPU and slows the PC. It proactively triggers stop errors on faulty drivers. Don't verify all drivers at once - test 10-20 suspect drivers in groups. If PC can't boot due to Verifier, disable it from Safe Mode.
